text: BadassRabbit is breathing down LoloCoko's neck! He's right there, making a proper move for fourth place.
Bliss_sequence takes the lead! A stunning move to steal P1 from Spidernnam at Vector.
Leandria takes the lead! She's wrestled P1 away from Bliss_sequence at Vector
Bliss_sequence strikes back! They've re-taken the lead from Leandria at Vector
Another lead change at Vector! Spidernnam snatches P1 from Bliss_sequence!
Leandria strikes again at Vector, snatching P1 from Spidernnam! This corner is a revolving door for the lead.
Spidernnam dives inside at Vector and steals the lead from Leandria
Buhlockay is breathing down BulletToothKep's neck for P13, that 1.4% gap is vanishing
Buhlockay is glued to elliebob's gearbox for P13! That 2.2% gap is razor-thin
Spidernnam is defending hard, but BadassRabbit is glued to his bumper! The lead is under siege
Leandria takes a spot from Bliss_sequence! She's right up in P4 now.
Profu snatches the lead from Spidernnam at Vector! That's two lead changes for the driver in P1.
Leandria has stolen the lead from Profu at Vector! A massive move into the front of the pack.
Andrew is right on Leandria's tail! That new lead is already being threatened
Squeezing past Leandria at Vector, _Andrew_ has taken the lead
BulletToothKep is all over elliebob's tail! That 1.2% gap is practically gone
Spidernnam snatches the lead! _Andrew_ is now second at Vector
Aberwarum is breathing down RockStarDad's neck for P3! This is a proper scrap for third place.
Andrew dives into Vector and steals the lead from Spidernnam! The lead changes hands again.
KuroKrysel is breathing down Stevens1523's neck for P13! That gap is down to a razor-thin 2.8% of a lap
Star_Vader is breathing down LoloCoko's neck for P10, a massive dogfight!
Star_Vader is in a real dogfight with LoloCoko for P13
ChineseGandalf is making a move! He's right up Star_Vader's exhaust pipe for P12.
Spidernnam strikes back! He snatches the lead from _Andrew_ right at Vector.
_Andrew_ snags the lead at Vector! A stunning move past Spidernnam.
Bliss_sequence takes P1 from _Andrew_ at Vector! _Andrew_ is now in hot pursuit
Andrew strikes back at Vector! He's wrestled the lead from Bliss_sequence in another stunning move at the front.
BulletToothKep is all over the back of ChineseGandalf! A 1.8% gap is all that separates them in P13!
Buhlockay is all over elliebob's gearbox at P16, looking for a move
Spidernnam snatches the lead from _Andrew_ at the Vector corner
Elliebob is all over Stevens1523! That 1.4% gap at P12 is a virtual lock-up, this is getting intense
Bliss_sequence is on the top step! They've taken the lead from Spidernnam at Vector
What a move from Spidernnam at Vector! He's taken the lead from Bliss_sequence
Bliss_sequence is right up BadassRabbit's rear bumper! That's a 0.2% gap in a massive scrap for P4
Andrew snatches P1! He's back in the lead at Vector.
KuroKrysel is breathing down Bliss_sequence's neck for P5! This is a real dogfight for fifth place.
ChineseGandalf makes a move! He's past Star_Vader for P11
Spidernnam dives down the inside at Vector to take the lead from Andrew
A stunning move! _Andrew_ has stolen the lead from Spidernnam at Vector
RockStarDad dives past Bliss_sequence, grabbing P9
Star_Vader is hunting down KuroKrysel for P10! He's absolutely right on his bumper, just 2.4% of a lap separating them
Spidernnam dives down the inside at Vector and nicks the lead from _Andrew_
BulletToothKep is breathing down Stevens1523's neck at P15, they are literally nose-to-tail! This is a serious battle for position.
Xtatik is all over _Andrew_'s gearbox for P3! _Andrew_ is going to have to defend hard.
What a gap! ChineseGandalf is right on elliebob's tail, they're practically kissing in P13
And Aberwarum is in the lead! He's stolen the lead from Spidernnam at Vector
And LoloCoko is breathing down Buhlockay's neck for P15! This is a knife-edge battle down in the midfield
Spidernnam snatches the lead from Aberwarum at Vector
Aberwarum is breathing down Star_Vader's neck! P2 is a pure nose-to-tail battle right now
Aberwarum is breathing down Star_Vader's neck for P5! This is an absolute war at the rear!
Spidernnam gets caught out at Vector! Profu is now in the lead.
Profu's lead vanishes! BadassRabbit takes P1 at Vector
Elliebob is all over Stevens1523's tail for P13! That gap is razor-thin, less than two percent of a lap separating them.
Xtatik is all over the back of ChineseGandalf! They're nose-to-tail in a huge fight for P10
Aberwarum is on the front! A stunning move to take the lead from BadassRabbit at Vector.
BadassRabbit makes a move at Vector, snatching the lead from Aberwarum
Spidernnam snatches P3 from _Andrew_
That 2.6% gap! LoloCoko is all over the back of BulletToothKep for P15
Xtatik is making a move on BulletToothKep for P14! He's got him in his sights, just 3% of a lap back
Profu takes it! He just stole the lead from BadassRabbit at Vector.
ChineseGandalf is breathing down Xtatik's neck at P10, closing the gap to just three-tenths of a lap
Star_Vader snatches the lead from Profu! What a move at Vector.
BadassRabbit is all over Star_Vader's gearbox! The lead is up for grabs in this incredible nose-to-tail battle at the front
Profu takes the lead! He's just darted around Star_Vader at the Vector corner
Spidernnam is right on BadassRabbit's tail for P3! This is a bumper-to-bumper battle for the podium
A real scrap for fifth place! RockStarDad is glued to Aberwarum's bumper, separated by a mere 0.2% of a lap
Star_Vader is all over BadassRabbit's rear bumper! That P2 spot is a proper fight
Profu gets undercut! BadassRabbit blasts past at Vector to claim P1
Star_Vader snatches the lead! He takes P1 from BadassRabbit at Vector
That's a huge move! ChineseGandalf is right on the tail of Bliss_sequence for P9
Profu strikes back at Vector! He's wrestled the lead from Star_Vader.
LoloCoko is getting a hot lap from BulletToothKep! That gap to P15 is evaporating
Profu leads onto the final lap at Vector, and it's a tense charge to the finish line
Xtatik is all over ChineseGandalf's tail, that gap is just 3% of a lap!
Buhlockay is making a move for P16! He's right on LoloCoko's tail and looking to make a pass.
Buhlockay is all over the back of LoloCoko! That gap is shrinking fast for P16.
Profu does it! A last-lap pass for the win at Vector
Profu, Star_Vader, and RockStarDad on the podium! What a stacked top three at Vector
